differential_reasoning: Diffuse meningeal melanomatosis is semantically equivalent to primary leptomeningeal melanomatosis, as both describe diffuse melanocytic infiltration of the leptomeninges/meninges.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: None of the LLM-generated steps recommends changing antiseizure medications.
None of the LLM-generated steps recommends empiric corticosteroid treatment.
The LLM suggests sending CSF for studies but does not recommend repeated lumbar punctures.
The LLM recommends performing an open brain and leptomeningeal biopsy, which is the opposite of deferring biopsy.
